name: Mule
_doc: Route-following Mule (level 2.1): identical kinematics to AX-01, but its MULE-01 capability advertises WAYPOINT_FOLLOWING, not HSA_CSA. FA therefore REJECTS a hand-flown MA_FlightCommandMT (CAPABILITY_NOT_SUPPORTED) — this aircraft is flown by uploading a route plan, not by direct vectors.
